description: Ian Quinn is introduced via a phone call, expressing displeasure with a failed plan and demonstrating his involvement as a shadowy backer of the technological attacks. This scene establishes Quinn’s manipulation and expectations for those under his influence.

transcript.line: I don't want to hear excuses why it didn't work. I have people who do that for me. I just want you to take care of it before I arrive. Just keep in mind how much this will benefit us both, yeah?
Mr. Quinn, plane's waiting for you, sir.
